steps.title: Spot the confirmation signal
steps.content: The transition "Indeed" signals that Schwartz's digital analysis confirms her theory about the Mona Lisa being a self-portrait. The blank needs a word meaning "verified" or "supported with evidence."

steps.title: Match the verification action
steps.content:
Schwartz ______ the two faces' structural resemblance using digital analysis — "Indeed" signals that this digital work confirms her theory, so the blank must mean verified or supported with evidence. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — corroborated: confirmed or supported with evidence — digital analysis of structural resemblance directly backs up her self-portrait theory. ✓
  • Choice B — amalgamated: combined or merged into one — Schwartz compared the faces, she didn't fuse them together. ✗
  • Choice C — promulgated: publicly announced or promoted — the analysis proved something, it didn't just publicize it. ✗
  • Choice D — consolidated: strengthened by combining — closer, but means merging resources, not providing evidence for a claim. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
